name: Nell's Banana Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream together sugar and butter until smooth.
2. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt into a separate bowl; set aside.
3. Add eggs to the creamed mixture one at a time, beating well after each addition.
4. Gradually add buttermilk, alternating with the sifted dry ingredients, until all is combined.
5. Fold in mashed bananas and vanilla extract.
6. Pour batter into 3 cake pans.
7. Bake at 325°F for approximately 30 minutes.
8. Frost with a confectioner's sugar recipe (1 1/2 times the quantity of the recipe on the box) or use your preferred frosting recipe.
9. Sprinkle chopped pecans over the top.
